items.question: How does Language Turtle work?
items.answer: Add vocabulary in the web app, practice in Telegram, and let spaced repetition schedule reviews so you remember more with less effort.

items.question: Do I need both Telegram and the web app?
items.answer: Telegram is great for daily practice on the go. The web app is where you manage words, tags, and your profile. Link both from your account settings.

items.question: Is my data private?
items.answer: Your vocabulary and progress belong to you. We use encryption in transit and sensible access controls.

ctaSection.title: Your daily language companion
ctaSection.subtitle: Practice in Telegram between meetings, manage your word list on the web, and let gentle reminders keep you on track.
ctaSection.buttonHint: Sign up in seconds — no credit card required.
ctaSection.buttonHintLoggedIn: Pick up where you left off — review words or add new ones.
